caption: The video appears to be a presentation or discussion on a systems thinking framework, as depicted by a circular diagram with various interconnected nodes. Each node represents different concepts such as "awaken," "systems thinking," "models and methods," "developing models," "model sharing," "what people do," "buying & selling," "fight dish," "leadership," "how people think," "we have a problem," and "future of society." The presenter, visible in a small window on the right side of the screen, seems to be explaining the relationships and flow between these concepts. The video transitions between two presenters, Gene Bellinger and Jerry Michalski, who take turns elaborating on the framework. The background is a dark interface with multiple browser tabs open, suggesting an online meeting or webinar setting. The overall focus is on understanding complex systems and their interconnections through a visual and collaborative approach.
